chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No.D- 1708 of 2012 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For katcha Peshi 19.02.2018. Mr. Abdul Jabbar Belai advocate for petitioner -=-=- Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that petitioner is not in his contact since long. According to him perhaps he lost his interest in this matter, therefore, he does not press this constitutional petition which is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE A.Rasheed/steno
